You wait an hour to see if anything happens, but nothing does. Just two ships running at full power, sitting in space. Partway through you get a snack, watching the other ship float listlessly through the void of space as you eat. Whatever trouble this ship is having, it isn’t obvious. Do you board it or leave?

The ship proves remarkably easy to dock with. In fact, as soon as your navigational computer begins to plot a course, it automatically extends a docking umbilical in your direction. You guide your craft through the necessary navigational hoops in order to properly connect with it and grab your gear. This could be dangerous.
Next

You divert your course towards the attached coordinates. It isn’t far, and the journey takes little more than a few moments at top speed. When your ship begins decelerating from relativistic speeds, your viewscreen lights up with a picture of the vessel in question. It’s an oddly leaf-shaped craft with a notch out of one side for a docking bay. In the back, a group of engines bundle together to form the stem. Your equipment is easily able to determine that the ship’s systems are all online, yet it remains stubbornly static and unmoving.

You ask Tessa about that favor she mentioned.

\n\nThe white woman stares at you a moment, her expression suddenly becoming serious. “Ah, yeah... That.” She sighs and sips her drink. Her body language is screaming discomfort as she shifts in her chair. “Okay, well I was wondering if you would...Um... Go to a wedding with me.”
\n\nYou stare blankly at the white ovir a moment, contemplating her request. “Like, as a date?”

\n\nTessa presses her lips tightly together, seemingly fighting off a scowl. “No. Not like a date, asshat.” The pale woman rubs her brow and takes a deep breath, collecting herself. “More like... I don’t know. For show.”
\n\nYou tell your ovir friend she is going to need to explain her request better than that.

\n\nThe pale woman groans, rolling her eyes so hard you suspect she caught a glance at her brain. “Fuck. Fine. I want you to come with me to this wedding, pretend we’re a happy couple and make me seem like I’m successful and well adjusted. Happy?”
\n\nAs the two of you stare at each other a moment, you let the request hang in the air. You break the silence after a few heartbeats. “Why are you asking me?”

\n\nTessa’s red orbs roll once more, although not quite as strongly as before. “Because you’re [pc.name] Steele. Does that answer your question?” The ovir stares at you a moment, then sips her drink again before continuing. “Look. You’re the heir to the biggest fortune ever or something like that. If I show up on your arm I’ll look like hot shit and make it look like I’ve done well for myself.”
\n\n“And you want to do this... why?” You suspect you know the answer, but ask regardless.

\n\nThe pale woman doesn’t answer right away, instead thinking on the question a moment. “Well... The wedding is for two... Uh... Friends I grew up with. Preschool up until the end of graduation so we all go way back. Half the people at the wedding are going to be from... Back home...” Tessa clears her throat a bit, then takes a large pull off her drink. “Look. I just want to make a good impression, okay? Will you come with me or not?” Her red eyes stare at you, expectantly.

You sit back on the couch and feel the ship vibrate as it pushes through the atmosphere, and you jerk a bit as autopilot kicks in, straightening out the ship’s path. Tessa leaves the cockpit a minute later and sighs at you. “Alright. Hair time.”

Tessa returns to the main room, her long white hair bone dry. If you didn’t see her as often as you did, you doubt you would have been able to tell she even styled it at all. Her hair seems to have an extra shine as it sits on her shoulders, and you can faintly tell it has more volume than normal. You glance over and see Tessa’s eyes are closed, and already snoring softly. Well that was fast. You decided to close your own eyes for a moment.

\n\nYou open your eyes, slowly rousing from sleep. You look around and notice you are alone, and naked. Why are you naked? You perk up and start looking around urgently for your clothes. You note your gear laid out next to you, alongside Tessa’s discarded dress. You look around some more, expecting to see a naked ovir somewhere. Instead you faintly hear the sound of running water. You spring up off the couch and move to the washroom, opening the door and entering. You see Tessa sitting in the shower, water falling on her naked form.
\n\n“Hey, Steele.” Tessa’s voice is hoarse and tired. “I guess I overdid it huh?”
\n\nYou confirm that indeed she did, and ask why she stripped you.

\n\nTessa shrugs. “I’m not sure. I don’t really remember what I was thinking.” The short woman stands up, watering falling off her curves. “I don’t even remember why I’m in the shower either. I think I need to lay down. Thanks for your help I guess.” Tessa shrugs and brushes past you, waving over her shoulder as she heads into her room.
\n\nYou stand there a moment, a little concerned. You gather up your things and head out, disembarking from the Ebony.

Tessa laughs. “Well that’s a reaction I guess. I still have to do my hair, but we can do that on route. First we have to make sure we are on the same page.” Tessa’s red eyes go serious and narrow. “We need to get our story straight, in case we are asked.”
\n\nYou nod, listening to her plan.

\n\n“Okay. So I’m your girlfriend. Let’s say we met at some... Steele sponsored charity or something. Oh! Right, they think I do charity work. Um... let’s say I’m not working at the moment. Like we’re some old fashioned couple or something dumb. You... Well, we can tell people the truth. A brave adventurer exploring the galaxy. Maybe leave out the X-rated bits?” Tessa’s eyes narrow further, her red orbs intense. “And do not under any circumstances talk about our sex life. Fictional or otherwise.”
\n\nYou laugh at that, but Tessa’s intense gaze forces you to stop and you agree to the rule.

\n\nTessa relaxes. “Good. Also if possible, try not to talk about me when I’m not around to lead the conversation. These people... talk. If you say something to somebody the whole room will know. Remember that nothing you say will be private!”
\n\nYou nod at that, taking careful note that your words will travel.

\n\nThe ovir smiles. “Alright. So guess I should mention the bride and groom, huh? They’re names are Karen and Monty. Wait, he might go by Montgomery now? Um... Fuck it’s been awhile. Anyways, Karen is an angel. Invited me to all her birthdays from age four until... well now. I seriously still get invites.” Tessa shakes her head slightly. “Monty is... Okay. I mean he was a total nerd growing up. Didn’t talk to him much, but he was never mean to me or anything.” Tessa points a sharp finger at you. “Be. Nice. I like them. Don’t ruin their wedding or I swear to fucking god I will lose my shit.”
\n\nYou stare at Tessa a moment, agreeing to be nice as best you can. She eyeballs you hard for a moment. You get the impression she doesn’t believe you.

\n\n“Right. Well. For other people try to be nice to as well. I want you to seem like a real catch after all. Not a fucking asshole.” She sighs and heads into her room, coming back a second later holding a pair of black heels and a small clutch purse. “I’m going to set the ship to start heading there, do my hair and brush my teeth.” Tessa opens the purse and pulls out a flask. “In a shocking twist, this isn’t beer. I figured I’d need something stronger. One for the road?” She offers you the flask.

You hear the water turn off. Tessa exits the bathroom and heads straight for her room, her pink robe on but open, leaving her white midsection revealed in the fleeting glance you get of her. A minute passes and she exits her room, wearing a fancy black matching bra and panty set. The bra is doing unbelievable work, making her already impressive chest look even bigger and more pronounced. After a moment you realize you’ve never seen her wear a bra before. Or panties for that matter.

\n\nTessa smirks, catching your gaze on her erotic attire. The female ovir does a small spin, showing off her round alabaster ass, and revealing her panties to be a blank thong. The way the straps sit under her curve of her tail suggest to you the underwear was made for ovir. “Can you believe they had this in the men’s section?” Tessa shakes her head and chuckles to herself.

\n\nOnce you get over the sight of her underwear, you notice Tessa holding a small black dress in her hand. She pulls it over her head and you can’t help but blush at how short and tight it is as she maneuvers into it. “Um... You’re wearing that to a wedding?”

\n\nTessa smirks as she slides her tail through a head sized hole in the back of the dress, suggesting the dress was also made for ovir. She adjusts the hem a bit and poses for you. “Of course. I want to turn heads.” The dress is more a cocktail dress than anything, showing off all of Tessa’s bra enhanced cleavage, and hugging close along her womanly hourglass hips. Her tail sticks out of the tight hole in the back, the fabric underneath tightly pulled against her round rear.
\n\n“Well? How do I look?”

Tessa frowns at that. “Alright... Well, I guess you do you... Those rentals weren’t cheap, but oh well. I don’t think people will care what you wear there to be honest. \n\nTessa turns and sighs. “I’m heading into the shower. I should only be 20 minutes at most. Just take a seat and relax or something while I’m in there. And stay the fuck out of my room!” Tessa pads off to the bathroom, followed a by the sound of her shower turning on a moment later.
